creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 237513
Update devel/qtcreator to 8.0.2

Update Qt Creator to release 8.0.2, see the release announcement:

https://www.qt.io/blog/qt-creator-8.0.2-released

This is just a minor bug fix release. Briefly tested on 13.1-RELEASE.
Although unrelated, please also consider bug #266389.
